pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py strictly enforce this exact dashboard name.
export_result.sh explicitly dumps the final dashboards into this file path, which verifier.py then loads.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) realTraffic dataset, downloaded from their official GitHub repository and fed into Graphite during environment setup. The expected dashboard name 'Network Routing Asymmetry' and the output path '/tmp/network_routing_asymmetry_dashboard_result.json' are both explicitly confirmed by the task description, export scripts, and verifier logic.
